title: Cacodemon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Cacodemon''' was a mythological [[Demon/Legends|demon]] that originated from stories told in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="JediPath">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref> The myths of these creatures had spread as far as the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="The Monster">{{GamerCite|2|The Monster}}''</ref> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Restelly Quist/Legends|Restelly Quist]] described the [[Jedi Trials/Legends#Trial of Spirit|Trial of Spirit]], one of the five tests that made up the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], as capable of making a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] face their worst fears, which sometimes manifested itself as a cacodemon.<ref name="JediPath" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|2|The Monster|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
